Had been watching software, but after I got chopped in $DDOG $SNOW a few times of the last week, those spidey senses were tingling. 

@Scot1andT talked about too many people saying they were tight and were going to roll, and he was dead on.

The lesson that helped me succeed in business hurt my trading results for years 👇

In business, working harder usually improves the outcome.

More calls.
More meetings.
More effort.
More execution.

So naturally, I brought the same mindset into trading.

Big mistake.

When

There is a real trading phenomenon of 'too tight for too long'. 

It's happened to me many times, where something looks amazing, but just never triggers and gets left behind. 

Then things get a little suss....

This is exactly what we saw with software all week - big volatility
